_description: Gold set: hand-labeled reference images for pattern accuracy benchmarking. Each entry has ground-truth expected_pattern and acceptable_patterns for boundary cases. Used by batch_runner.py and benchmark expansion.

known_challenges: very soft shadows may read as flat rather than butterfly
beauty dish produces butterfly but with softer transitions than hard sources
entries.notes: Beauty dish clean — centered overhead beauty dish, soft even fill, minimal shadows, classic beauty portrait

known_challenges: tight crop limits full shadow analysis
may read as clamshell if fill detected below
entries.notes: Butterfly/Paramount lighting — key centered directly above, symmetrical shadow under nose, beauty close-up
Multi-panel Hurley setup with high light_count — clamshell geometry but can appear high_key due to multiple sources inflating catchlight count. Acceptable to classify as either clamshell or high_key.

known_challenges: fill below may register as floor bounce
low-res image (171x256) limits catchlight position detection
entries.notes: Clean clamshell beauty portrait — beauty dish above, fill below, both visible in catchlights

known_challenges: full body shot — face is small relative to frame
white seamless creates blown edges
catalog lighting is intentionally pattern-less — minimal shadows
entries.notes: White seamless catalog — full body on white seamless, even studio lighting, e-commerce/catalog style

known_challenges: blown highlights reduce shadow signal
multiple sources cancel each other — light count hard to determine
entries.notes: High key beauty — bright white background, minimal shadows, very even multi-source fill

known_challenges: blown white background reduces edge contrast
multiple sources cancel shadows — pattern geometry ambiguous
entries.notes: High key beauty — bright white background, even multi-source lighting, minimal shadows, clean beauty closeup

known_challenges: high fill ratio reduces shadow contrast — may read as flat
corporate lighting prioritizes flattering over dramatic — pattern borders are soft
entries.notes: Corporate soft key + fill — soft key from upper left with fill, professional headshot, gray background

known_challenges: loop vs rembrandt boundary depends on nose shadow extent
entries.notes: Standard loop lighting — key slightly above and 30 degrees off-axis, nose shadow loops down

known_challenges: natural light editorial blurs studio pattern categories
warm tones may suggest golden hour
environmental bounce fill complicates source count
entries.notes: Soft editorial key — warm natural soft key from left, open shade fill, jewelry editorial, architectural setting

known_challenges: warm color cast may affect CCT detection
low_key is a mood/ratio not a geometric pattern — classifiers may return the geometric pattern instead
entries.notes: Low key editorial — warm single key from upper right, dark background, dramatic falloff, fashion pose

known_challenges: loop vs rembrandt boundary is subtle
entries.notes: Classic Rembrandt portrait — single key at 45 degrees, triangle on shadow-side cheek

known_challenges: hard shadow edge may confuse softness estimator
entries.notes: Strong split lighting — key at 90 degrees, half face in shadow, hard edge

known_challenges: contrast gate may reject triangle if contrast is higher than expected
entries.notes: Hurley triangle setup — 3 lights, two upper and one lower, even wrap

known_challenges: window light may be classified as studio if catchlights are absent
entries.notes: Natural window light from the side — soft falloff, single large source

known_challenges: B&W removes color temperature cues for environment detection
window visible in frame — may help or confuse environment classification
soft falloff similar to large studio softbox
entries.notes: Window soft side light — soft diffused window light from left, B&W portrait, intimate mood, brick/window setting

known_challenges: sunglasses occlude eyes — no catchlight detection possible
sweat specular highlights may confuse surface analysis
rim-dominant lighting is rare in pattern training data
face partially obscured by glasses
entries.notes: Athletic rim sculpt — hard edge/rim light from behind, sweat highlights, dark key side, sports editorial

known_challenges: no face — face mesh and catchlight analysis unavailable
product photography pattern not in core portrait classifiers
translucent glass creates complex light transmission
reflective surface on base adds specular complexity
entries.notes: Bottle backlight product shot — perfume bottle backlit on black, light transmits through glass, reflective surface

known_challenges: broad vs short depends on face turn vs light direction — requires pose analysis
B&W removes color temperature cues
entries.notes: Broad lighting — key on the wide side of face (side turned toward camera), dramatic B&W portrait

known_challenges: face obscured by cap — no face mesh possible
rim-dominant with near-silhouette body
full-body framing reduces face detail
B&W removes color temperature cues
entries.notes: Editorial rim + key — strong rim/backlight from behind-right creating silhouette edge, minimal front fill, fashion pose

known_challenges: flat lighting has minimal shadows, pattern classifiers may return unknown
full-body shot — face may be too small for face mesh
entries.notes: Over-filled flat lighting — multiple sources cancel shadows, very low contrast

known_challenges: gobo pattern is rare in training data
extreme shadow ratio may confuse pattern classifiers
face mesh may fail with partial face visibility
entries.notes: Gobo/flag lighting — cross-shaped light strip across face, deep black surround, dramatic editorial

known_challenges: blind shadows create gobo-like stripe pattern on face
window_negative_fill is a setup variant but visual reads as gobo
striped shadows may confuse face mesh landmark detection
entries.notes: Window with negative fill — window blinds casting striped shadow pattern across face, warm side light, high contrast

known_challenges: golden_hour is an environment not a geometric pattern — classifiers may return the shadow geometry instead
warm color cast saturates skin tones
eyes closed limits catchlight analysis
entries.notes: Golden hour portrait — warm low-angle natural sunlight, strong orange/gold color cast, outdoor

known_challenges: reflector may produce weak lower catchlight, triggering false clamshell
entries.notes: Loop key with reflector fill from below — 1 active light + passive reflector

known_challenges: overcast is an environment not a geometric pattern
very soft diffused light produces near-zero shadow signal
outdoor scene with complex background may confuse analysis
entries.notes: Overcast natural — outdoor portrait under overcast sky, soft diffused light, no harsh shadows, urban setting

known_challenges: catchlight detector may miss, forcing reliance on shadow-only classification
entries.notes: Rembrandt-lit portrait with dark eyes — catchlights barely visible, shadow pattern strong

known_challenges: face completely in shadow — no face mesh or catchlight signals
hat occludes most of head
rim_only is rare in pattern training data
near-silhouette may return unknown
entries.notes: Rim only — pure rim/edge light from behind, face in deep shadow, hat obscures features, dramatic silhouette

known_challenges: ring light is identified by catchlight shape not shadow geometry
B&W image removes color cues
engine may classify as butterfly due to similar frontal/centered key
entries.notes: Ring light portrait — circular catchlights, even frontal illumination, slight shadow halo behind subject

known_challenges: short vs broad depends on face turn direction relative to key — requires pose solver
very dark image may limit shadow analysis
rim light on far shoulder could register as second source
entries.notes: Short lighting — key on narrow side of face (side turned away from camera), dark moody portrait with rim

known_challenges: extreme low-key with most of face in shadow
face angled down — limited frontal face mesh coverage
short vs split boundary ambiguous at extreme angles
hair backlighting may register as second source
entries.notes: Short fashion key — dramatic key on narrow side, hair lit from behind, extreme contrast, B&W fashion editorial

known_challenges: no face — all face-based classifiers unavailable
product photography patterns outside core portrait training
soft diffused multi-source lighting has minimal shadow signal
entries.notes: Tabletop soft product — cosmetics jar on stacked stones, soft even diffused lighting, green seamless background
